steps.t: Langlas is at the Thrasi's Lodge west of Kheledûl. Swayed by Toronn's reminder of their lost friend Thoram, Bregar asks you to bring the broken sword …
Bregar is at Duillond, along the road east and south of the Thrasi's Lodge. Langlas gratefully accepted Thoram's sword, promising to honour it, then g…
